Methinks I should be nicknamed "The local Chuuya drug dealer," what do y'all think (perhaps a joke, perhaps not 😝)

Anyways, uh???? 500 followers?? Where the fuck do y'all come from 😭 Regardless, I'm so very appreciative of all the unrelenting love and support of my work! <3 Thank you so much!! 500 is considerably a big milestone, seeing that that's halfway to 1k. I do wonder if one day I'll make it there.. Only time can tell! :)

So many people request me Chuuya fluff and smut, but I may take it upon myself to put out more angst eventually, because I feel an intense need to make people (and myself) cry 😔/j
